sentences.arabic: تَتَصَدَّرُ الْكَبْسَةُ قَائِمَةَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ فِي دُوَلِ الْخَلِيجِ، وَتُعْتَبَرُ الْوَجْبَةَ الرَّئِيسِيَّةَ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kabsa predvodi listu tradicionalnih jela u zaljevskim zemljama i smatra se glavnim obrokom u društvenim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa tops the list of traditional dishes in the Gulf countries and is considered the main meal on social occasions.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْكَبْسَةُ فِي تَحْضِيرِهَا عَلَى لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ مَعَ الْأَرْزِ طَوِيلِ الْحَبَّةِ، وَمَزِيجٍ خَاصٍّ مِنَ الْبُهَارَاتِ مِثْلِ اللَّوْمِي وَالْهَيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema kabse zasniva se na janjetini s rižom dugog zrna i posebnoj mješavini začina poput sušene limete i kardamoma.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa preparation relies on lamb with long-grain rice and a special blend of spices such as dried lime and cardamom.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ طَهْيُ اللَّحْمِ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا حَتَّى يُصْبِحَ طَرِيًّا جِدًّا وَيَمْتَصَّ نَكْهَةَ الْمَرَقِ الْمُتَبَّلِ بِشَكْلٍ عَمِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Kuhanje mesa zahtijeva dugo vrijeme dok ne postane veoma mekano i duboko upije ukus začinjenog bujona.
sentences.translationEn: Cooking the meat requires a long time until it becomes very tender and deeply absorbs the flavor of the seasoned broth.

sentences.arabic: تُقَدَّمُ الْكَبْسَةُ عَادَةً فِي أَطْبَاقٍ وَاسِعَةٍ، وَيُزَيَّنُ سَطْحُهَا بِاللَّوْزِ الْمُحَمَّصِ وَالزَّبِيبِ لِإِضْفَاءِ لَمْسَةٍ مِنَ الْفَخَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kabsa se obično poslužuje u velikim posudama, a njena površina se ukrašava prženim bademima i grožđicama kako bi se dodao dašak luksuza.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa is usually served in large dishes, and its surface is decorated with roasted almonds and raisins to add a touch of luxury.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ تَعَدُّدِ طُرُقِ تَحْضِيرِهَا، تَبْقَى الْكَبْسَةُ رَمْزًا لِلْهُوِيَّةِ وَالْأَصَالَةِ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos brojnim načinima pripreme, kabsa ostaje simbol identiteta i autentičnosti u arapskoj kuhinji.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the many ways of preparing it, Kabsa remains a symbol of identity and authenticity in Arab cuisine.
